scripts.clean: bun run --filter @smela/api clean & bun run --filter @smela/web clean & rm -rf node_modules & wait
scripts.dev: bun run dev:api & bun run dev:web
scripts.check: bun run check:api & bun run check:web & wait $(jobs -p)
scripts.e2e:web: bun run --filter @smela/api dev & bun run --filter @smela/web e2e & wait $(jobs -p)
scripts.e2e:web:ui: bun run --filter @smela/api dev & bun run --filter @smela/web e2e:ui & wait $(jobs -p)
